platformUniqueIds.comboPlatformId: ## WILL BE REPLACED BY COMBO_ID WITH VENDOR_COMBO_ID 'ORIGINAL_COMBO_3926' AND VENDOR KEY 'V-01' ##
platformUniqueIds.comboDeliveryCenterPlatformId: ## WILL BE REPLACED BY DYNAMIC COMBO_DELIVERY_CENTER_PLATFORM_ID WITH KEY 1 ##
platformUniqueIds.deliveryCenterPlatformId: ## WILL BE REPLACED BY DYNAMIC DELIVERY_CENTER_ID HASH WITH KEY 1 ##

vendorUniqueIds.vendorDeliveryCenterId: ## WILL BE REPLACED BY DYNAMIC DELIVERY_CENTER_ID WITH KEY 1 ##
vendorUniqueIds.vendorId: ## WILL BE REPLACED BY VENDOR_ID WITH KEY 'V-01' ##
